info.name: Enterprise Multi-Agent RAG Platform - Postman Collection
info.description: Generated automatically from OpenAPI Spec v0.1.0

request.description: Retrieves real-time message trace audits with complete observability logs.
Switch the active LLM model for this workspace. Any authenticated user can do this.
Lists all prompts and versions in a workspace.

Registers a new version of a prompt in the workspace.
If is_active is set to True, it deactivates all other versions of the same prompt name.
Sets a specific version of a prompt to active and disables other versions of the same name.
Deletes a specific prompt version.
Sync prompt templates from Langfuse Prompt Registry.
List all A/B testing experiments configured in a workspace.
Create a new A/B testing experiment in draft mode.

Update an experiment definition.
If the status transitions to 'active', all other active experiments in this workspace are set to 'ended'.
Remove an experiment.

Fetches comparative analysis metrics between Variant A and Variant B for an experiment.
Queries the AnalyticsLog and Evaluation tables to output side-by-side stats.
Upload an audio/voice note, transcribe it, and index it into a Knowledge Base.
List all voice transcriptions for a knowledge base.
Get the full transcript for a voice document.
Upload a scanned PDF or image, extract text via OCR, and index into Knowledge Base.
List all OCR-processed documents for a knowledge base.
Get the full extracted OCR text for a document.
Upload a meeting recording, transcribe it, and extract Summary, Action Items, and Decisions.
List all meeting analyses for a workspace.
Get a specific meeting analysis by ID.
Delete a meeting analysis.

Start an autonomous research task.
The system will automatically:
1. Research the topic using web intelligence
2. Search the workspace knowledge base
3. Synthesize a comparison/analysis report
4. Generate a PDF report
5. Email the report (if email_to provided and SMTP configured)
List all research tasks for a workspace.
Get research task status and results by ID.
Delete a research task.
Get PDF download information for a completed research task.
Retrieves all active workspace, long-term, and semantic memories.
Performs a vector-similarity semantic memory lookup.
Manually triggers the OpenAI consolidation compression engine for facts.
Deletes a specific memory from database storage.
Return the full model catalogue grouped by provider.
Return each provider's configuration status (has API key or not).

Blocking LLM call. Returns the full response once generation finishes.
Provider is auto-detected from the model name.

SSE streaming call. Returns text/event-stream.
Each SSE event: data: <token>


Final event:    data: [DONE]
Quickly detect which provider a model string routes to.
